metadata.title: ProZen
metadata.description: Enter Zen mode to focus on writing. The plugin expands current tab to full screen removing everything but content.

regex.source: .setDesc("Intensity of vignette's dimming effect. Set to 0 to turn vignetting off.")
regex.target: .setDesc("暗角效果的昏暗程度。设置为 0 可关闭暗角效果。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Determines how close to the screen's center vignetting spreads from both sides of the screen, as linear gradients.")
regex.target: .setDesc("确定从屏幕两侧向屏幕中心传播的晕影的距离，以线性渐变的方式。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Determines how close to the screen's center vignetting spreads from borders of the screen, as a radial gradient.")
regex.target: .setDesc("确定了从屏幕边缘向屏幕中心传播晕影的距离，以径向渐变方式。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The duration (in seconds) of fade-in animation on entering Zen mode")
regex.target: .setDesc("进入专注模式时淡入动画的持续时间（以秒为单位）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show the tab's header in Zen mode")
regex.target: .setDesc("在专注模式下显示标签页标题")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show the scrollbar in Zen mode. If it is hidden, scrolling is still available with mousewheel, arrows, touchpad, etc.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在专注模式下显示滚动条。如果滚动条被隐藏，仍然可以通过鼠标滚轮、方向键、触控板等进行滚动。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show the graph view's controls in Zen mode")
regex.target: .setDesc("在专注模式下显示图形视图的控件")

regex.source: .setDesc("Center text content in Zen mode, even if in regular view it takes all of the screen's width (ignore 'Editor -> Readable line length' being off in Zen mode)")
regex.target: .setDesc("在专注模式中居中文本内容，即使在常规视图中占据整个屏幕宽度（忽略在专注模式中关闭“编辑器 -> 可读行长度”）")
